transcript.text:
(A restaurant secretly opened by a famous celeb?!) I heard a famous celebrity opened it secretly
(Who could it be...)
(Who is it?)
(The star of [I Live Alone], Lee Jang-woo!)
(Reason he has to avoid her...) Why are you avoiding me?
Three plates of ribs
Three udon
One fish cake
(Jang-woo the owner is frantic at the expected order...)
(Here come the dishes!)
(Quite... a lot of them...)
Looks delicious!
(Jang-woo, you are the best!)
Wow, it's impressive...
Got a great stomach!
(Surprised Jang-woo) You ate a lot

(Sir, we are surprised as well...)
(The taste of udon...) Wow, the soup of this...
(It's amazing!!!) Wow!!
(If so, ma'am...)
(Would you like a shot?)
(Mukbang with Jang-woo starts right now!)
Hello, everyone
Right now, I am at Garak-dong
and I'm here to eat udon
This udon place
was opened secretly by a famous celebrity,
so I asked permission to come and film!
He said he wants to battle it out only based on the taste,
so he was reluctant on getting filmed
(I'll have a taste first...) But I got his permission before it'll become famous
Oh, I'm standing right in front of it

and... How should I explain this?
(Right there!) Can you see that?
(Instant Udon and Bulgogi Restaurant) (I can smell it... The smell of a great local eatery...)
(The person who guesses this is a genius LOL) You can't really tell who opened this place! How...
(Scanning the menu beforehand) If you see here, there's udon, ribs...
(The main dish is udon and plate of ribs, and assorted fish cakes!)
(Revealing the identity of the owner!) If you see who runs this place, you'll be really surprised
(Who is the person who has trusty cooking skills....?!) If this person makes it, I think it'll be really good!
(Who is the person who has trusty cooking skills....?!) Oh! Hello!
(Nice to meet you) Hello
(The star of [I Live Alone], actor Lee Jang-woo!) Yes, hello
(Grand Prize winner of MBC Entertainment Awards 2022) Congrats on winning the Popularity Award!
(Congrats) Me? Suddenly LOL
(Congrats) Thank you so much for coming
Don't thank me
(The humor of the award winner LOL) I didn't think you'd actually come...

(Let's go to our seats now!) Please sit! I was so surprised...
(What is this cute reserved spot?)
Oh, but the store is....
It's unexpected, right?
Yes! It was totally unexpected!
I really love instant udon
(That aesthetic is to die for...) The udon they sell at old-school street vendors
(It's hard to find these days....) It's all gone now, I can't find it anymore
I usually make udon a lot to relieve hangovers
But it's too far to visit
(I will make it and eat it myself...) You wanted to eat it
(I will make it and eat it myself...) Seriously, I wanted to eat it
So actually,
I didn't want to reveal that I was the owner
(Thank you for letting us film...) I said that I wanted to film, so you said I should visit
When I'm here, I cook the food

- Oh, you actually make the food? - Of course
(The Powder Prince is on another level...!) I'm a cook!
(Perfect as a side for drinks!) The assorted fish cake dish is great with drinks
(The assorted fish cakes are a must for avid drinkers!) If you're not going to drink today, you don't need to order them
You can just have the instant udon and a plate of ribs
To fit the table perfectly,
three plates of ribs,
three bowls of udon,
and one fish cake
(He's not even surprised now... LOL) I'll prepare it like that then
(Jang-woo is off to work) Please chill-lax for now
(Made by Prince Jang-woo...)
(Instant udon made with cooking skills you can trust!)
(With the aesthetics of udon from a street vendor...)
(Instant udon)
Thank you

Oh, there's also some seasoning!
(Let's make the plate of ribs!)
(He even plates it in that old-school vibe...!)
(A plate of ribs)
Wow, looks delicious!
(Old-school style with bread on the side...!) They really serve bread! Awesome!
Oh, is this green-onion kimchi?
(The same kimchi she ate last time she met him) Yes, our own kimchi!
(How can I forget that green onion kimchi...) I was reminded of it, I'll order it online
Oh! Thank you!
Bread and pickled radish
(With macaroni, it'll be delicious!) You can put the macaroni on the bread too
(Bon appetit!) Enjoy your food
(Bon appetit!) Thank you
(I missed you, green onion kimchi...) It's been a while since I had green onion kimchi
Can you eat all of this?

(12000% chance she will eat it all) I think I can... I'll give it a try
Wow...that's impressive...
- That's impressive being thin - Exactly
(She does, indeed! LOL) Got a great stomach!
It's just us two...And we ordered 3!
We have a great stomach too LOL
Oh, this is the udon and there's a lot of fish cakes inside
(Looks so scrumptious) It looks very appetizing
(Mix in the seasoning!) Looks so good!
Wow, this is...!
(Hangovers, get lost!!) It relieves your hangover right away
(Even hangovers you don't have will be gone LOL) I didn't even drink, and I feel refreshed, seriously!
It's good... I absolutely love it!
There's fried tofu and a lot of fish cakes inside
(Those who don't like crown daisies, please note!) There's a lot of crown daisies in here,
(Those who don't like crown daisies, please note!) but I can't eat it well, so I asked them to take it out

It has a kick and it's very refreshing
Oh, I love it!
(Getting over the hangover she doesn't have LOL) Wow, the soup is....
(Next is the plate of ribs!)
It looks really delicious, doesn't it?
It's so good!
Wow, it's seriously good
The ribs are amazing!
(Cut a huge rib in half!)
Mr. Jang-woo is very good at making things that everyone would love
Dishes that can be enjoyed by all ages!
(This time, having it with bread!)
Take the ribs...
And add it like this, to make it like an hamburger!
Hamburgers they used to sell in front of schools!
Macaroni!

(A happy smile...)
(Oh, right!) He said to add pickled radish!
The bread is really good too
You know those dinner rolls, buttery dinner rolls!
I thought it was weird to put pickled radish in here,
but it's actually good
The pickled radish goes very well with this once it's added!
(A familiar taste that you can't get sick of...) I love how I am never sick of this taste
The portions
are quite big!
There's fish cake and fried tofu too
I want to open this kind of eatery in front of my house... LOL
Old-school udon places like this
are great for relieving hangovers and a hefty meal
(It's sad that most are gone now...) But recently, a lot of them have disappeared
Wow, but...

No matter how much I look at this,
(It's unbelievable right now...) I can't imagine that a celebrity would run this place
Eating it with this bread is really good, so I want another one
(+ Ribs)
(+ Lettuce)
(+ Pickled radish)
(+ Macaroni)
(A perfect visual) I think I made it better than last time
Should I exclude the spicy seasoning this time?
And add double into this one?
But adding the seasoning has a kick, so it's more delicious
(Seasoning, come on in...! LOL) You know what, I'll add some
Come back!
(These aesthetics are the charms of instant udon!)
(The seasoning is precious) You have to have the seasoning for the kick
(Slurping sounds in the middle of silence...)

Rather than the trendy taste these days,
(Somewhat nostalgic signboard and familiar exterior design) the outside of the eatery
also makes it seem like a legitimate udon eatery!
But there's so many fish cakes in here, and the portion's huge
(Cleared two bowls!)
But...
He eats quite a lot...!
(Cleared 4 servings alone??) He ate two udon bowls and two rib plates, right?
(He has a reputation for a reason!) I ate two udon bowls and two plates of ribs
(He has a reputation for a reason!) Really? Two of them?
(He has a reputation for a reason!) If you eat two, it's really filling
(Tzuyang is surprised) He's no joke!
(Can you feel how we feel...?) It makes no sense...!
(Wait... That is...?) Do you need this?
(Welcome, soju!)
Oh, I really would like that

(Upset) But I drove here...
(Next time, come here to drink without a car!) Does it suit your taste?
(Next time, come here to drink without a car!) It's so good
You ate a lot!
(She's already drunk at heart... LOL) I didn't even drink, and I feel like my hangover's relieved
I see that you're good with spicy food
- Huh? It's not spicy though - Oh, really?
A long time ago... You said you couldn't eat Shin Ramyun
(Strongly denies) No
(The pride of eating spicy food is boiling inside me!) I can eat everything up until Buldak noodles
Did you seriously eat two of each?
(A fact) Yes
- Really? - Yes
(His reputation as a foodie is great...) I added rice into one, and left a bit for the other one
But that's more than what normal people eat...!
I was born wrong, seriously

(Popularity Award winner of MBC Entertainment Awards 2022 / Lee Jang-woo) Why am I even a celebrity...
(Shame on you, YouTube, for missing out on him) If YouTube was available during my generation...
Oh, but this is so good
(Inhaling mode) I was scarfing it all down
A lot of people are curious about this udon
There are no powder* additives *Model for a multi-purpose seasoning powder
(Why is that so cool... LOLOL) Really? No powder?
The powder...
(A thief for his money) It's quite expensive
(A thief for his money) Right, it's expensive
For the seasoning...
(Worked on it for two months...??) I worked on it for two months
I tend to eat spicy food
(It was even affecting his health) that completely destroys my stomach
(Thanks to his efforts, we are able to enjoy it well!) So this is a meal that relieves your hangover perfectly
I think... this store will hit jackpot

(Hope it goes well!!!) Well, that's good then
(We'll enjoy the rest) Enjoy your food
(We'll enjoy the rest) Thank you
(What a shame, soju...) Oh, a glass of this...
With green onion kimchi on top!
With the green onion kimchi, it's a very Korean-like taste!
You can just eat green onion kimchi with rice
(Kimchi is a must for Koreans!)
I'll have a taste of the assorted fish cakes
This is perfect for drinks!
(Assorted fish cakes with various types of fish cakes) There's a variety of fish cakes
(The fish cakes have taken center stage...LOL)
Do you know how it feels to relieve your hangover by drinking with side dishes?
(This is how it feels)
It's so refreshing!
It feels like

my insides are all cleaned out
Wow, what a kick!
(Her inner spice-wimp comes out) It suddenly feels so spicy
(Right then, have a piece of ribs! LOL) I should eat this, rib!
(The plates are empty now..)
I love the soup
I think it tastes better once cooled
Is there a hair tie?
(Shampooing with the soup) Food keeps getting on it...
(What a witty man!) Oh my! Thank you!
(What a genius...!)
I didn't even imagine!
(Successfully tied her hair!)
I only grabbed the bread, and I know it's delicious already
It's no joke
It's insane, this is really a hamburger

(Warning, this is not a burger joint)
(Last instant udon!)
It was so numbing just now
(Udon with rib patties??) You wrap the rib patties with udon?
(Scary...)
Do you need anything?
I'm fine
You're eating so well
- Can I have a handshake? - Of course!
(Thank you for thinking of me well)
It's an honor
May I have Coke, please...
(Jang-woo appears) Coke?
(Jang-woo appears) Yes
You can have everything!
What? Really?

(Can you handle it?) I'll take it like this
This is my....
(Soju is Jang-woo's)
I didn't have lunch and I'm hungry too...
Then you should have a plate next to me!
- Should I, then? - Sure!
(Setting the table again)
(Ultra-speed) Did you boil it already? That's so quick
(A soju glass appeared naturally) Please help yourself!
(Hehe)
(That was smooth...LOL) Oh my!
- Oh, is this your meal?! - Of course!
(Should I give up on my car...?) Should I call a designated driver?
I'll do cheers with Coke!
(Drinks are best-tasting during daytime) It's daytime...!
Oh, you have nothing going on at night?

(Jang-woo is free!) My TV series filming ended yesterday
(Stealing the green onion naturally)
(The green onion kimchi episode / Multi-purpose powder episode) He's the only person who was on our YouTube multiple times
At this rate, aren't I your employee? LOL
Wow!
Can I drink on your YouTube...?
(Of course you can) Of course, I drink sometimes too
If...
I eat with drinks, I can eat a lot!
That's the same for our producer...
- Right? - Yes
If there are no drinks, I can't eat much
(False hunger without alcohol...) Did you forget feeling full with alcohol?
I guess you eat a lot
Oh, I'll pour you a glass!
Thank you

(Hope you hit jackpot!) Please do well!
("Udon and Bulgogi Restaurant" Hope you hit jackpot!!!)
Do you enjoy drinking at daytime?
(The real deal!) Drinking is great at daytime
If I have two bottles and walk outside,
the world looks so pretty...!
(That is the magic of alcohol...) Is it magic?
(That is the magic of alcohol...) Right
You eat really quickly!
Aren't you full after eating one?
(One serving is nothing) One doesn't make me feel full
(While I'm here, I'll borrow some macaroni) Excuse me
Clean!
(Cleared "Udon and Bulgogi Restaurant" with Jang-woo!)
I really enjoyed my meal today
And it's the new year, so Happy New Year to you

(I hope this restaurant becomes successful...!) Plus, thank you for allowing me to film like this
I hope you are happier in the new year
(Jang-woo is flooding her with great words) You have to be happy for your viewers to be happy
(But he is repeating what he said before...) I have to be happy for the viewers to be happy
(But he is repeating what he said before...) That's what's really important
I'm drunk right now!
(Tipsy)
I had another great meal!
Are you okay?
